textByHash.59d7889cc9b1d84f0c5adae0fb8160d4a005e8b8: Sorry, I'm currently out of javelins.
textByHash.6b6a101d28f43e94fb7d970953df5b15de50c797: Dragon javelins? [laugh], you'll be a chief advisor to the King before you ever hold a dragon javelin!
textByHash.af3347b4e4df6e9b0ffed1165d48744d4be3deaa: Would you like to buy or sell any javelins?
